grid_dims_observed.note: Same named grid as EE-03 (1/2/3 horizontal at 0/5.0/8.5, E/D/C/B/A vertical at 0/2.7/5.0/8.5/10.0), cross-validated again here. Only the leading eave dimension above E differs (1.10m here vs 2.00m on EE-03 ground floor) since the 2nd-floor roof overhang differs from the ground-floor eave -- expected, not a discrepancy.

elements.description: Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'j' in นอน 3, one near the door/window side, one lower near the partition wall shared with the ensuite bathroom
Downlight labeled 'i' inside the small ensuite bathroom between นอน 3 and นอน 2, next to an architectural toilet-fixture icon (plumbing symbol, not itself electrical)
elements.room: ห้องน้ำ (ensuite ติด นอน 3)

elements.description: A cluster labeled 'e,f' at the partition wall between the ensuite bathroom and นอน 2 -- read as a 2-gang switch controlling loop e (นอน 2 fixtures) and loop f (นอน 2 fixtures)
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'e' near the top of นอน 2
Downlights (⊕) labeled 'f' in นอน 2 -- one mid-room, two more toward the bottom of the room
A cluster labeled 'g,h' near the top of the staircase ('ขึ้น') in โถง -- read as a 2-gang switch for hall/stair lighting circuits
Symbol labeled 'g' near the staircase with a '2/LP' circuit tag printed immediately beside it, marking this as the feed point for the upper-floor lighting circuit (panel LP, circuit 2)
Symbol labeled 'dh' near the bottom of the stair landing in โถง -- combined label unclear, possibly two adjacent marks 'd' and 'h' merged at this resolution
A boxed 'LP' panel glyph drawn near the โถง/นอน 1 boundary -- likely the physical mounting location of the same LP panel detailed on EE-02, placed on this upper floor near the hall
elements.room: โถง / นอน 1 boundary

elements.description: Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'c' inside the bathroom adjacent to แต่งตัว/นอน 1, next to an architectural toilet-fixture icon

elements.description: Downlight labeled 'd' in แต่งตัว (dressing room)
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'a' near the แต่งตัว/นอน 1 boundary
Four downlights (⊕) labeled 'b' in นอน 1, two mid-room and two near the exterior window wall

Two marks labeled 'k' near the นอน 1 / ระเบียง boundary, at the bottom of the plan -- glyph not confidently matched to any symbol on the EE-01 legend; may relate to a ceiling fan or AC-adjacent fixture rather than a lighting point
elements.room: นอน 1 / ระเบียง boundary

warnings: GRID: named grid columns/rows match the master file and EE-03 exactly (see grid_dims_observed note).
This is a 2-story house so this sheet only covers the upper floor; the corresponding ground-floor lighting plan is EE-03 (page 61, separate file).

Several background roofline/level annotations are printed on this sheet but are architectural/structural, not electrical, so were excluded from 'elements': dashed 'แนวหลังคา' (roof edge line, appears ~4 times around the plan perimeter) and 'หลังคา ค.ส.ล.' (RC roof slab) level markers boxed as '5 +3.65 ⊖' (top-left, กันสาด/canopy) and '5 +3.75 ⊖' (x2, left and right sides) -- these are carried over from the architectural/roof base drawing this electrical plan was traced onto.

The 'k' symbol (x2, near นอน 1/ระเบียง boundary) does not match any entry on the EE-01 symbol legend read on page 59 -- flagged for cross-check against the mechanical sheets (pages 65-66) in case it denotes an AC or ventilation-related point rather than a lighting fixture.

A second 'LP' panel glyph appears on this floor plan in addition to the panel schedule already detailed on EE-02 (page 60) -- read as the same physical panel's mounted location rather than a second panel, but not cross-confirmed against EE-02's title block (which doesn't specify a floor).

Single-letter room-fixture labels are legible as symbols but fine switch-loop wiring/label text is hard to resolve at the available image resolution -- several elements flagged needs_human_review_zoom_required, consistent with the EE-03 (page 61) extraction for this house.
